chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. S – 250 of 2024 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case For hearing of main case 23.12.2024 Mr. Achar Khan Gabol, Advocate for the Petitioner Mr. Shahryar Awan, Assistant Advocate General Sindh along with SIP Deedar Hussain Abbasi. >>>>>..<<<<< Learned counsel for the applicant under instructions does not press instant Constitutional Petition, which is dismissed as not pressed. Judge ARBROHI
